creator: kheechin@gmail.com
text:
Have not received any form of ack/reject from the ports maintainer,
thus, I'm submitting a follow-up since without this new version, the
port fails to run under python 2.6.

Regards,
Khee Chin.


---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Khee Chin <kheechin@gmail.com>
Date: Wed, Sep 2, 2009 at 12:01 PM
Subject: Hi Sergey, further information related to Subject:
amd64/138446: UPDATE: databases/skytools
To: skv@freebsd.org


Hi Sergey,

I had submitted a patch back in May to update databases/skytools to
2.1.9, however, this update to version 2.1.10 needs to have a higher
priority than the previous patch as it addresses a keyword "as" in
versions prior to 2.1.10 that became a keyword only in Python 2.6,
thus, people who use versions prior to 2.1.10 are unable to run the
port out of the box and need to manually patch the affected file
themselves.

A further list of changelog can be found at
http://pgfoundry.org/frs/shownotes.php?release_id=1471 and
http://pgfoundry.org/frs/shownotes.php?release_id=1329 (for 2.1.9)

Regards,
Khee Chin.
